title: Scholia v0.6 golden-records compatibility manifest
description: Canonical golden trace records for the Scholia v0.6 contract. The 2026-06-06 frozen records pin the v0.6.0 baseline and are append-only — they MUST NOT be mutated. The spec_version string stays "Scholia v0.6" across point releases; the v0.6.1 reconciliation (optional status on <Concluding>) is added by appending a new golden record, not by editing the freeze. Each record's trace validates against the published scholialang reference validator at the stated minimum version.

record_fields.date_added: ISO date the record was added.
record_fields.frozen: true for the 2026-06-06 freeze (append-only, never mutate); false for later appends.
record_fields.title: Human-readable summary of what the record demonstrates.
record_fields.description: What contract surface the record pins.
record_fields.expects: Expected validation outcome and the minimum reference-implementation version that produces it.

golden_records.title: canonical_id on every atom; required Goal closed by a status-less Concluding
golden_records.description: Pins the v0.6.0 baseline: content-addressable canonical_id on every atom (canonical_id_well_formed passes, recomputed == claimed) and a priority=required Goal closed by a Concluding that carries for_goal but NO status. Mirrors examples/v06/canonical_id_basic.xml.
golden_records.trace:
<Step id="step_01" name="confirm migration complete">
  <Goal id="G_01" canonical_id="sha256:bf6e30cce9a8" scope="trace" priority="required" criticality="ledger">Migrate Finding for_goal callers to for_hyp.</Goal>
  <Hypothesis id="H_01" canonical_id="sha256:5a17f169cbd9">Every call-site has moved to for_hyp.</Hypothesis>
  <Observation id="Obs_01" canonical_id="sha256:6a0535014191">grep -rn "for_goal=" src returned zero matches.</Observation>
  <Evidence id="E_01" canonical_id="sha256:bfe4b088b050" for="H_01" polarity="supports">REFER:Obs_01 confirms no remaining callers.</Evidence>
  <Finding id="F_01" canonical_id="sha256:2df5addb97bb" for_hyp="H_01" status="met">All call-sites migrated.</Finding>
  <Concluding id="C_01" canonical_id="sha256:600e8449f856" for_goal="G_01" criticality="ledger">REFER:F_01 AND REFER:Obs_01 IMPLIES the migration is complete.</Concluding>
</Step>

expects.notes: Status-less Concluding; the v0.6.0 closed-set parser accepts it. Unchanged across v0.6.1 — a status-less close stays valid.

golden_records.title: required Goal closed via the back-compat Finding(for_goal, status) path
golden_records.description: Pins the v0.6.0 goal_declared (rule 8) back-compat path: a priority=required Goal closed by a <Finding for_goal=... status="met"> (the for_goal alias is deprecated but read-accepted in v0.6, removal deferred to v0.7).
golden_records.trace:
<Step id="Step_01" name="Simple goal + finding closure">
  <Goal id="G_01" scope="trace" priority="required">Ship a small change.</Goal>
  <Action id="A_01">Edit file foo.py.</Action>
  <Finding id="F_01" for_goal="G_01" status="met">File edited.</Finding>
</Step>

expects.notes: Finding.for_goal is deprecated (use for_hyp) and emits a DeprecationWarning when set in Python; it remains read-accepted in v0.6, removal deferred to v0.7.

golden_records.title: required Goal closed by a status-bearing <Concluding status="met"> (v0.6.1)
golden_records.description: APPENDED for v0.6.1. Demonstrates the reconciliation: a priority=required Goal closed directly by a <Concluding for_goal=... status="met">. status is the optional completion verdict (met|unmet|partially_met), distinct from confidence (certainty) and criticality (load-bearing rank). This is the form a producer following goal_declared (rule 8) literally emits. It is the v0.6.1 target contract: the pre-reconciliation v0.6.0 parser rejects status on <Concluding> (the closed-set parser omits it); the downstream scholialang v0.6.1 build (gated on this spec) accepts it.
golden_records.trace:
<Step id="step_01" name="confirm migration complete">
  <Goal id="G_01" scope="trace" priority="required" criticality="ledger">Migrate Finding for_goal callers to for_hyp.</Goal>
  <Hypothesis id="H_01">Every call-site has moved to for_hyp.</Hypothesis>
  <Observation id="Obs_01">grep -rn "for_goal=" src returned zero matches.</Observation>
  <Evidence id="E_01" for="H_01" polarity="supports">REFER:Obs_01 confirms no remaining callers.</Evidence>
  <Finding id="F_01" for_hyp="H_01" status="met">All call-sites migrated.</Finding>
  <Concluding id="C_01" for_goal="G_01" status="met" confidence="0.85" criticality="ledger">REFER:F_01 AND REFER:Obs_01 IMPLIES the migration is complete.</Concluding>
</Step>

expects.notes: Requires the v0.6.1 reconciliation build that adds optional status to the <Concluding> closed-set attributes. Under the pre-reconciliation v0.6.0 parser this trace fails (status rejected on <Concluding>) — that is the v0.6.0 contradiction this release resolves. status-less closes (the frozen records above) stay valid; this addition is additive and non-breaking.
